rationale: The one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's inline comment questioning whether reduce_scatter/device_communicator verification is missing for a group in the test) maps almost exactly onto Candidate X's finding that _TP lacks the device_communicator/reduce_scatter assertions the other groups got — a near-identical, well-grounded, concretely actionable catch. Candidate Y missed this entirely and recommended APPROVE with only a soft, non-blocking documentation nit about dp_metadata caching. X's other findings (docstring nits, stale comments) are all grounded in the diff even if minor, giving it solid precision alongside much higher recall.
